name: workflow-orchestrator
description: Multi-agent workflow orchestration adapted from Open SWE subagent pattern + Paperclip ticket system. Task routing, delegation, and completion tracking.

capabilities.task_routing: Route tasks to best-fit agent based on security level and tool allowlist
capabilities.delegation_chain: organizer-os delegates to specialists, tracks completion
capabilities.retry_logic: crew_factory pattern — rebuild crew on retry to skip exhausted providers
capabilities.parallel_execution: Independent subtasks run in parallel across agents
capabilities.ticket_system: Each task gets unique ID, status tracking, completion attestation
capabilities.escalation_path: Failed tasks escalate: Agent → Supervisor → organizer-os → Human

rules: crew_factory must be called on each retry (not reuse stale crew)
Max 3 retries per task before escalation
Supervisor score: Q(0.4) + A(0.25) + C(0.2) + F(0.15) → ACCEPT/RETRY/ESCALATE
Agent tool usage must match AGENT_TOOL_ALLOWLISTS (8-level security)
All task state persisted to JSONL checkpoints for crash recovery
